input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
topics = {
    'AFCON': ['AFCON', 'Africa Cup', 'Morocco', 'Nigeria', 'semifinal'],
    'NFL playoffs': ['NFL', 'playoff', 'Wild Card'],
    'Iran province': ['Iran', 'province', 'police', 'security'],
    'Nipah': ['Nipah', 'Kerala'],
    'Man United': ['Manchester United', 'Fletcher'],
    'Somalia': ['Somalia'],
    'Senate': ['Senate', 'funding', 'budget'],
    'BRICS': ['BRICS'],
    'Syrian fighters': ['Syria', 'SDF', 'Aleppo', 'fighters'],
    'Oscar': ['Oscar', 'Academy Award'],
    'Grammy': ['Grammy'],
    'Australian Open': ['Australian Open', 'draw'],
}
counts = {}
with open('articles/2026/01/09/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        for topic, kws in topics.items():
            for kw in kws:
                if kw.lower() in title.lower():
                    counts[topic] = counts.get(topic, 0) + 1
                    break
for topic, count in sorted(counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
    print(f'{topic}: {count}')
"

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find Iran province police deaths - check for specific numbers
with open('articles/2026/01/09/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        content = a.get('content','') or ''
        if 'iran' in title.lower() and ('police' in title.lower() or 'killed' in title.lower() or 'security' in title.lower()):
            # Check for province mentions and numbers
            text = content[:5000].lower()
            for prov in ['sistan', 'baluchestan', 'khuzestan', 'fars', 'kerman', 'bushehr', 'hormozgan', 'kurdistan']:
                if prov in text and ('30' in text or 'thirty' in text or 'police' in text):
                    idx = text.find(prov)
                    context = content[max(0,idx-100):idx+300]
                    print(f'=== {prov}: {title[:100]}')
                    print(context[:400])
                    print('---')
                    break
" | head -20
input.description: Search for Iran province police deaths
